structured_payload_candidate.title: Chiller Plant Enable Logic

structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Enable the plant in the lowest stage.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Chiller Plant Enable with Waterside Economizer
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Chilled water plant with waterside economizer
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When plant is enabled in WSE Mode, open CW isolation valve of WSE, stage on lead pumps and towers. When enabled in Chiller Mode, open CHW and CW isolation valves of lead chiller, stage on lead pumps and towers, then enable lead chiller.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Plant is enabled.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: If WSE Mode: open WSE CW isolation valve, stage lead primary CHW pump (or secondary for primary-secondary), CW pump, and cooling towers. If Chiller Mode: open lead chiller CHW and CW isolation valves, stage lead pumps and towers, then enable lead chiller.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When the plant is enabled: a. If the plant is enabled in WSE Mode... 1. Open the CW isolation valve of the waterside economizer... 2. Stage on lead primary CHW pump, CW pump, and cooling tower(s)... b. If the plant is enabled in Chiller Mode... 1. Open the CHW isolation valve of the lead chiller... 2. Open the CW isolation valve of the lead chiller... 3. Stage on lead primary CHW pump, secondary CHW pump, CW pump, and cooling towers... 5. Once the lead pumps are proven on, enable the lead chiller.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Chiller Plant Disable Sequence
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Chilled water plant
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When plant is disabled, shut off all enabled chillers, close CHW isolation valves after 3 minutes or when chiller stops requesting flow, close CW isolation valves similarly, then disable pumps and towers.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Plant is disabled.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Shut off all enabled chillers. For each enabled chiller, close CHW isolation valve after 3 minutes or chiller is not requesting CHW flow. Close CW isolation valve after 3 minutes or chiller is not requesting CW flow. Disable operating pumps and cooling towers.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When the plant is disabled: a. Shut off all enabled chillers, if any. b. For each enabled chiller, close the CHW isolation valve after 3 minutes or the chiller is not requesting CHW flow. c. For each enabled chiller, close the CW isolation valve after 3 minutes or the chiller is not requesting CW flow. d. Disable the operating primary CHW pump(s) (if enabled), secondary CHW pump(s), CW pump(s), and cooling tower(s)...

structured_payload_candidate.title: Condenser Water Return Temperature Control for Tower Fans
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Water-cooled chiller plant with dynamic load profile
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Control tower fan speed to maintain CWRT at setpoint. CWRT setpoint is calculated based on CHWST setpoint and target lift, which is a function of plant part load ratio. Tower speed is limited by head pressure control and part load ratio.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Any condenser water pump is proven on.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Maintain CWRT at setpoint using a direct acting PID loop. Map loop output to tower speed from minimum to 100%. Tower speed command is the lowest of CWRTTowerSpd, HpTowerMaxSpd from each chiller, and PlrTowerMaxSpd.
configurable_values: PlrTowerMaxSpd (reset from 100% at 50% OPLR to 70% at 0% OPLR)
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When any condenser water pump is proven on, CWRT shall be maintained at setpoint by a direct acting PID loop. The loop output shall be mapped to the variable CWRTTowerSpd. Map CWRTTowerSpd from minimum tower speed at 0% loop output to 100% speed at 100% loop output. Tower speed command signal shall be the lowest value of CWRTTowerSpd, HpTowerMaxSpd from each chiller head pressure control loop, and PlrTowerMaxSpd.

structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Lock off all chillers. Index remaining equipment to Stage 0+WSE. Resume staging from Stage 0+WSE when plant is disabled or switch is released.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Chillers shall be locked off (start/stop points overridden to off at highest protocol priority) upon closing of emergency chiller off switch located at chiller room entry. Remaining equipment shall remain enabled and be indexed to Stage 0 + WSE until the plant is either disabled or the emergency power off switch is released, at which point staging shall resume from Stage 0 + WSE.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Chiller Plant Performance Monitoring - Total Plant Power
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Chilled water plant
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Calculate total plant power as sum of chiller power, pump power, and cooling tower fan power. Use actual power from VFD interfaces for variable speed motors; assume fixed BHP * 0.746 / 0.93 for fixed speed motors.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Plant is operating.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Calculate total plant power at least every 30 seconds. Record time-averaged values at least every 5 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Total plant power. Calculate total plant power as the sum of chiller power, pump power, and cooling tower fan power. For motors with VFDs, power shall be actual power as read through the VFD network interface. For fixed speed motors (e.g., CW pumps without VFDs), power shall be assumed to be fixed at BHP (from equipment schedule) * 0.746 / 0.93 (approximate motor efficiency).

structured_payload_candidate.title: Chiller Plant Performance Monitoring - Total Plant Load (Primary Loop)
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Primary-only or primary-secondary plant with primary circuit flow meter and CHWST/CHWRT sensors
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Calculate plant load using primary flow, CHWRT, and CHWST: Qplant = FLOW_P * (CHWRT - CHWST) / 24 [tons].
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Plant is operating.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Calculate plant load at least every 30 seconds. Record time-averaged values at least every 5 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Total Plant Load. Calculate plant load using flowrate through the primary circuit, FLOW P; chilled water return temperature upstream of the first HX or chiller, CHWRT; and primary loop chilled water supply temperature leaving the plant, CHWST. QPlant = FLOW P (CHWRT - CHWST) / 24 [tons]

structured_payload_candidate.title: Chiller Plant Performance Monitoring - Equipment Load
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Chilled water plant
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Calculate load for each operating chiller and WSE heat exchanger using flow through the equipment and entering/leaving temperatures.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Equipment is operating.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Calculate equipment load at least every 30 seconds. Use measured flow if available, otherwise assume proportional to design flow or use design flow for constant primary loops.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Equipment Load. structured_payload_candidate.title: Chiller Plant Alarms - Tower Basin Heater Status Mismatch
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Cold climate water-cooled plant with tower basin heaters
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Generate Level 2 alarm if commanded on but status off for 15 seconds. Generate Level 4 alarm if commanded off but status on for 15 seconds.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Commanded on, status off for 15 seconds (Level 2) OR commanded off, status on for 15 seconds (Level 4).
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Generate appropriate level alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Tower basin heater alarm is indicated by the status being different from the output command for 15 seconds. a. Commanded on, status off: Level 2. Do not evaluate alarm until the equipment has been commanded on for 15 seconds. b. Commanded off, status on: Level 4. Do not evaluate alarm until the equipment has been commanded off for 15 seconds.

structured_payload_candidate.title: CHW Plant AFDD - FC#5: Primary Flow Too Low with Bypass Fully Open
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Primary-only plant with minimum flow bypass valve
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Fault condition: FLOW P, AVG < CHW-MinFlowSp – ƐFM and MFBPV ≥ 99% - ƐMFBVP. Possible diagnoses: Problem with minimum flow bypass valve, problem with chiller CHW isolation valves, minimum loop DP setpoint too low.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: FLOW P, AVG < CHW-MinFlowSp – ƐFM and MFBPV ≥ 99% - ƐMFBVP.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Report Level 3 alarm with description and possible diagnoses.
configurable_values: ƐMFBVP (bypass valve position error threshold, default 5%)
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Primary chilled water flow is too low with the minimum flow bypass valve fully open.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: FC#5 Equation: FLOW P, AVG < CHW-MinFlowSp – ƐFM and MFBPV ≥ 99% - ƐMFBVP Applies to OS #2, #3, #5 Description: Primary chilled water flow is too low with the minimum flow bypass valve fully open. Possible Diagnosis: Problem with minimum flow bypass valve, Problem with chiller CHW isolation valves, Minimum loop differential pressure setpoint too low
